typography.strategy: Soft Utility (Dashboard / Apps) - Friendly rounded sans for headings, clean geometric for body.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight text-[#1C2B28] font-bold
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight text-[#1C2B28] font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Mobile-first, The 'Bento' Grid Protocol (Mode B for Dashboard)
spacing_and_layout.card_style: Flat Solid surfaces (NO glassmorphism for medical to prevent clinical coldness), subtle borders border-[#E1E5E2], no harsh shadows.

components.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5
components.inputs: Shadcn input customized with rounded-xl border-[#E1E5E2] bg-[#F3F4F1]/30 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#184B3D]/20
components.map: Interactive map layout taking 40-50% width on desktop. Custom markers using primary color (#184B3D)
components.calendar_timetable: Horizontal scroll for dates, vertical list for timeslots. Available slots: bg-[#E8EFEA] text-[#184B3D] hover:bg-[#184B3D] hover:text-white. Unavailable: muted.
components.cards: Subtle borders, white background, generous padding (p-6)

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Soft transform translate-y-[-2px] and shadow-sm for interactive cards (practitioner profiles).

media_urls.description: Modern waiting room with chairs and inspirational sign.
man in white dress shirt wearing black framed eyeglasses
man in white scrub suit wearing green mask
Senior doctor with arms crossed, wearing white coat and stethoscope, standing outside.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA guidelines, especially for secondary text over muted backgrounds.

specific_instructions_to_main_agent: The application interface language MUST be entirely in French.
Install and configure 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' fonts via Google Fonts and Tailwind config.

For the Landing Page Hero: Use the 'hero_background' image with a heavy, warm overlay (e.g., bg-[#FCFCFA]/90 or a gradient) to ensure the search bar and text are perfectly readable. The search bar is the main CTA.
The Search Interface should feature fields for Speciality, Name, and Location. It must be highly visible.
Search Results Page: Implement a split-screen layout on desktop. Left side: List of practitioners (cards with avatar, name, specialty, next available slot). Right side: Interactive Map.

Interactive Timetable: Needs to be a prominent feature on the practitioner profile page. It should show 5-7 days horizontally, with vertical timeslots. Use the defined secondary color for available slots.
Dashboards (Patient & Practitioner): Use 'The Control Room' grid pattern. Dense, organized, relying on subtle borders (#E1E5E2) instead of cards with heavy drop shadows.
DO NOT use glassmorphism. It feels too clinical and cold for a modern organic health app. Stick to solid white or off-white surfaces.
